cost_name: All-In Total CAPEX — PEM 100 MW Greenfield — Europe 2025 (Aggregated Benchmark)

estimation.estimation_method: Bottom-up aggregation of CS-ELC-006 + CS-ELI-001 + CS-HPR-001 + CS-CIV-001 + CS-IND-001/002/003/004. Validated against IRENA total system cost range (€1,100-2,100/kW). Central estimate consistent with Technology Card TC-PEM-001.

confidence.rationale: Aggregated from Class C components. Weighted confidence 0.60 (Medium). This is a reference class estimate — an AVERAGE for this technology/scale/region. Individual projects will deviate based on site, offtake, developer, and procurement strategy.

exclusions: This is an AGGREGATED BENCHMARK. It is NOT a project-specific estimate.
OPEX, LCOH, financing costs during construction
Dedicated renewable generation (solar farm, wind farm)

sources.title: IEA GHR 2025 + IRENA 2024 aggregated total PEM CAPEX
sources.author: IEA / IRENA
